tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -P OUTPUT ACCEPT; iptables -F OUTPUT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp -m multiport --dports 53,8853,5353 -d 0.0.0.0/0 ! -d 192.168.1.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp -m multiport --dports 53,8853,5353 -d 0.0.0.0/0 ! -d 192.168.1.1 -j REJECT; iptables -S OUTPUT; ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo HTTP_OK"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
iptables -P OUTPUT ACCEPT; iptables -F OUTPUT;  iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p udp -m multiport --dports 53,8853,5353 -d 0.0.0.0/0 ! -dd 192.168.1.1 -j REJECT; iptables -I OUTPUT 1 -p tcp -m multiport --dports 53,88553,5353 -d 0.0.0.0/0 ! -d 192.168.1.1 -j REJECT; iptables -S OUTPUT; ping -c 1 -WW 2 192.168.1.2; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo HTTP_OKK
